view.title: Validate persona scenario #2

blocks.title: Persona Scenario Validate 2 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: The exploratory step is blocked due to insufficient evidence to validate the requirement.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: The exploratory step is blocked due to insufficient evidence to validate the requirement.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the scenario of copying settings from one business to another, but there is no concrete evidence provided that confirms this functionality. While the linked use case describes a scenario involving bids and selections, it does not include any API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate the ability to copy settings, leading to an inconclusive result. Therefore, the evidence does not support a definitive validation of the requirement.

gaps: No evidence of API reads or persisted state checks confirming that settings can be copied between businesses.
